title: Mission Control — /today Daily Agent Surface
description: Evolve Morning Brief into Mission Control: prioritized missions with why, snooze/done actions, priority scoring, and default post-login landing. Builds on GET /api/brief/today and morning_brief.py.

userStories.title: Mission priority scoring engine
userStories.description: backend/brief/mission_scorer.py scores each brief item by urgency (overdue days, interview proximity, fit score, pending autopilot). Returns sorted missions with priority rank and reason string.
acceptanceCriteria: Brief API returns missions array with priority and reason

userStories.title: Mission actions API — snooze and done
userStories.description: POST /api/brief/missions/{id}/snooze and /done. Store snoozed_until and completed_mission_ids on user or brief_missions collection. Snoozed items excluded from today view.

userStories.title: TodayPage UI — mission cards with why
userStories.description: New /today route (alias /brief). Hero shows #1 mission headline. Cards show priority badge, reason line, primary CTA. Snooze and Done buttons. Use AiSection/designTokens.

userStories.title: Nav and post-login default to Today
userStories.description: Nav link Today with Sun icon. /brief redirects to /today. morning_brief_ready notification links /today.

userStories.title: End-of-day progress strip
userStories.description: Today page footer: X of Y missions cleared today using completed_mission_ids.
